author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Implement the evidence-aware decision core that scores tested variants, rewards empirically useful role structure, and penalizes failed role inflation and coordination overhead.
research_question: How should BDC CLI v2 convert tested variants and measured outcomes into architecture scores that correctly override generic priors when strong evidence exists?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after TASK-7470 is SUCCESS.

tests_required: failed variants reduce recommendation score for repeated structures
empirically useful roles get positive contribution
coordination penalty increases with unnecessary role inflation
TextAI_Auto penalizes harmonizer inflation because Variant E failed
scorer remains deterministic on the same packet
definition_of_done: TextAI_Auto role inflation corrected at scorer level
